name: Descriptive Statistics Median Quartiles Outliers
title: Descriptive Statistics [Median, Quartiles, Outliers] — Indicator by mutarawilliam9 — TradingView
source: DESC:This indicator seeks to provide insight to traders by modeling market structure using widely accepted statistical methods applied to price data. It does not predict direction; instead, it describes how current price behaves relative to its historical distribution.It is built around non-parametric statistics, making it resistant to distortion from extreme price movements.What it shows?1. Median (Q2): The central equilibrium level of price distribution.2. Quartiles (Q1, Q3): Boundaries of the “normal” trading range.3. Interquartile Range (IQR): Measures the width of the core market structure.4. Outlier Bands (1.5 × IQR rule): Statistical extremes where price becomes unusual relative to recent behavior.How it works?The indicator collects price data either through:1. Reset Mode: Builds a new distribution each session (Daily, Weekly, Monthly, or chart timeframe).2. Length Mode: Uses a rolling window of the last N candles.All values are sorted to construct a real-time price distribution, from which median, quartiles, and outlier thresholds are derived.How to use it?1. Price inside Q1–Q3 range → normal market conditions2. Price near Median → equilibrium / fair value zone3. Price outside Outlier bands → statistically extreme conditions (potential exhaustion, expansion zones or news driven events)4. Large expansions between Q1 and Q3 → increased volatility and potential momentum in either directionKey concept?This tool does not forecast price. It provides a distribution map of market behavior, helping traders understand structure, deviation, and statistical positioning of price.⚠️ NoteThis indicator is for educational and analytical purposes only and should not be used as standalone trading advice.Author: TUGUME WILLIAM MUTARA

Interquartile Range (IQR): Measures the width of the core market structure.4. Outlier Bands (1.5 × IQR rule): Statistical extremes where price becomes unusual relative to recent behavior.How it works?The indicator collects price data either through:1. Reset Mode: Builds a new distribution each session (Daily, Weekly, Monthly, or chart timeframe).2. Length Mode: Uses a rolling window of the last N candles.All values are sorted to construct a real-time price distribution, from which median, quartiles, and outlier thresholds are derived.How to use it?1. Price inside Q1–Q3 range → normal market conditions2. Price near Median → equilibrium / fair value zone3. Price outside Outlier bands → statistically extreme conditions (potential exhaustion, expansion zones or news driven events)4. Large expansions between Q1 and Q3 → increased volatility and potential momentum in either directionKey concept?This tool does not forecast price. It provides a distribution map of market behavior, helping traders understand structure, deviation, and statistical positioning of price.⚠️ NoteThis indicator is for educational and analytical purposes only and should not be used as standalone trading advice.Author: TUGUME WILLIAM MUTARA

name: Forex Sessions Clean Final IST
title: Forex Sessions Clean Final (IST) — Indicator by deepaksahani4571 — TradingView
source: //@version=5indicator("Forex Sessions Clean Final (IST)", overlay=true)// IST timezonetz = "Asia/Kolkata"// Timeh = hour(time, tz)m = minute(time, tz)t = h * 60 + m// Session times (SUMMER)tokyo_start  = 5 * 60 + 30tokyo_end    = 14 * 60 + 30london_start = 12 * 60 + 30london_end   = 21 * 60 + 30ny_start     = 17 * 60 + 30ny_end       = 2 * 60 + 30// ConditionsinTokyo  = (t >= tokyo_start and t <= tokyo_end)inLondon = (t >= london_start and t <= london_end)inNY     = (t >= ny_start or t <= ny_end)// Variablesvar box tokyoBox  = navar box londonBox = navar box nyBox     = na// TOKYO (RED dotted)if (inTokyo and not inTokyo[1])    tokyoBox := box.new(bar_index, high, bar_index, low,         border_color=color.new(color.red, 40),         border_style=line.style_dotted,         bgcolor=na)    label.new(bar_index, high, "TOKYO",         textcolor=color.black,         color=color.white,         style=label.style_label_down,         size=size.small)if (inTokyo)    box.set_right(tokyoBox, bar_index)    box.set_top(tokyoBox, math.max(box.get_top(tokyoBox), high))    box.set_bottom(tokyoBox, math.min(box.get_bottom(tokyoBox), low))// LONDON (Purple)if (inLondon and not inLondon[1])    londonBox := box.new(bar_index, high, bar_index, low,         border_color=color.new(color.purple, 40),         bgcolor=na)    label.new(bar_index, high, "LONDON",         textcolor=color.black,         color=color.white,         style=label.style_label_down,         size=size.small)if (inLondon)    box.set_right(londonBox, bar_index)    box.set_top(londonBox, math.max(box.get_top(londonBox), high))    box.set_bottom(londonBox, math.min(box.get_bottom(londonBox), low))// NEW YORK (Green)if (inNY and not inNY[1])    nyBox := box.new(bar_index, high, bar_index, low,         border_color=color.new(color.green, 40),         bgcolor=na)    label.new(bar_index, high, "NEW YORK",         textcolor=color.black,         color=color.white,         style=label.style_label_down,         size=size.small)if (inNY)    box.set_right(nyBox, bar_index)    box.set_top(nyBox, math.max(box.get_top(nyBox), high))    box.set_bottom(nyBox, math.min(box.get_bottom(nyBox), low))
description: clean ist sessions timings as per indian time use it and tell me

name: CISD
title: CISD — Indicator by roldansandoval09 — TradingView
source: //@version=5indicator("SMC FINAL PRO (ULTIMATE CLEAN)", overlay=true, max_lines_count=500, max_labels_count=500, max_boxes_count=500)// SETTINGSshowBOS = input.bool(true, "Show CHoCH / BOS")swingLen = input.int(7, "Swing Length")minGap = input.int(10, "Min Gap Between Signals")bosColor = input.color(color.teal, "BOS Color")chochColor = input.color(color.red, "CHoCH Color")showCISD = input.bool(true, "Show CISD")showFVG = input.bool(true, "Show FVG")extendFVG = input.int(20, "Extend FVG")fvgBullCol = input.color(color.new(color.gray, 90))fvgBearCol = input.color(color.new(color.gray, 90))// PREVENT DUPLICATESvar float lastDrawnHigh = navar float lastDrawnLow  = na// SWINGSph = ta.pivothigh(high, swingLen, swingLen)pl = ta.pivotlow(low, swingLen, swingLen)var float lastHigh = navar float lastLow = navar int lastHighBar = navar int lastLowBar = navar int trend = 0var int lastSigBar = naif not na(ph)    lastHigh := ph    lastHighBar := bar_index - swingLenif not na(pl)    lastLow := pl    lastLowBar := bar_index - swingLen// BREAKSbullBreak = not na(lastHigh) and close > lastHigh and close[1] <= lastHighbearBreak = not na(lastLow) and close < lastLow and close[1] >= lastLowchochUp = bullBreak and trend == -1chochDown = bearBreak and trend == 1canDraw = na(lastSigBar) or (bar_index - lastSigBar > minGap)// STRUCTUREif showBOS and bullBreak and canDraw and (lastHigh != lastDrawnHigh or na(lastDrawnHigh))    startBar = lastHighBar    endBar   = bar_index    midBar   = startBar + int((endBar - startBar) / 2)    line.new(startBar, lastHigh, endBar, lastHigh, color=chochUp ? chochColor : bosColor)    label.new(midBar, lastHigh, text=chochUp ? "ch" : "bos", style=label.style_none, size=size.small, textcolor=chochUp ? chochColor : bosColor)    lastDrawnHigh := lastHigh    trend := 1    lastSigBar := bar_indexif showBOS and bearBreak and canDraw and (lastLow != lastDrawnLow or na(lastDrawnLow))    startBar = lastLowBar    endBar   = bar_index    midBar   = startBar + int((endBar - startBar) / 2)    line.new(startBar, lastLow, endBar, lastLow, color=chochDown ? chochColor : bosColor)    label.new(midBar, lastLow, text=chochDown ? "ch" : "bos", style=label.style_none, size=size.small, textcolor=chochDown ? chochColor : bosColor)    lastDrawnLow := lastLow    trend := -1    lastSigBar := bar_index// =====================// SMART CISD// =====================bullCISD = close[1] < open[1] and close > open[1]bearCISD = close[1] > open[1] and close < open[1]var line[] bullCISDs = array.new_line()var line[] bearCISDs = array.new_line()if showCISD and bullCISD    l = line.new(bar_index - 1, high[1], bar_index + 50, high[1], color=color.yellow)    array.push(bullCISDs, l)if showCISD and bearCISD    l = line.new(bar_index - 1, low[1], bar_index + 50, low[1], color=color.yellow)    array.push(bearCISDs, l)if array.size(bullCISDs) > 0    for i = array.size(bullCISDs) - 1 to 0        l = array.get(bullCISDs, i)        if low <= line.get_y1(l)            line.delete(l)            array.remove(bullCISDs, i)if array.size(bearCISDs) > 0    for i = array.size(bearCISDs) - 1 to 0        l = array.get(bearCISDs, i)        if high >= line.get_y1(l)            line.delete(l)            array.remove(bearCISDs, i)// =====================// FVG// =====================bullFVG = low > high[2]bearFVG = high < low[2]body = math.abs(close - open)candleRange = high - lowstrongMove = body > (candleRange * 0.5)var box[] bullFVGs = array.new_box()var box[] bearFVGs = array.new_box()if showFVG and bullFVG and strongMove    b = box.new(bar_index - 2, high[2], bar_index + extendFVG, low, bgcolor=fvgBullCol)    array.push(bullFVGs, b)if showFVG and bearFVG and strongMove    b = box.new(bar_index - 2, high, bar_index + extendFVG, low[2], bgcolor=fvgBearCol)    array.push(bearFVGs, b)if array.size(bullFVGs) > 0    for i = array.size(bullFVGs) - 1 to 0        b = array.get(bullFVGs, i)        if low <= box.get_top(b)            box.delete(b)            array.remove(bullFVGs, i)if array.size(bearFVGs) > 0    for i = array.size(bearFVGs) - 1 to 0        b = array.get(bearFVGs, i)        if high >= box.get_bottom(b)            box.delete(b)            array.remove(bearFVGs, i)// =====================// 🔥 HIGH PROBABILITY ORDER BLOCK (LIGHT)// =====================bodyOB = math.abs(close - open)rangeOB = high - lowstrongOB = bodyOB > (rangeOB * 0.6)bullOBColor = color.new(color.teal, 85)bearOBColor = color.new(color.red, 85)var box[] bullOBs = array.new_box()var box[] bearOBs = array.new_box()if showBOS and bullBreak and strongOB and close[1] < open[1]    b = box.new(bar_index[1], high[1], bar_index + 25, low[1], bgcolor=bullOBColor, border_color=color.new(color.teal, 70))    array.push(bullOBs, b)if showBOS and bearBreak and strongOB and close[1] > open[1]    b = box.new(bar_index[1], high[1], bar_index + 25, low[1], bgcolor=bearOBColor, border_color=color.new(color.red, 70))    array.push(bearOBs, b)if array.size(bullOBs) > 0    for i = array.size(bullOBs) - 1 to 0        ob = array.get(bullOBs, i)        if low <= box.get_bottom(ob)            box.delete(ob)            array.remove(bullOBs, i)if array.size(bearOBs) > 0    for i = array.size(bearOBs) - 1 to 0        ob = array.get(bearOBs, i)        if high >= box.get_top(ob)            box.delete(ob)            array.remove(bearOBs, i)// REQUIREDplot(na)
description: This indicator is a Smart Money Concepts (SMC) tool designed to help traders identify key market structure and high-probability trading zones. It features automatic detection of Break of Structure (BOS) and Change of Character (CHOCH), along with filtered Fair Value Gaps (FVG) and high-probability Order Blocks that are removed once mitigated to keep the chart clean. It also includes a smart CISD system that extends and disappears upon interaction, providing dynamic insight into price behavior. Built for clarity and precision, this tool focuses on institutional concepts to support better decision-making across all timeframes.

name: JSaKj0Fm
title: XRP Breakout Trend Indicator by getrich03 — TradingView
source: //@version=6indicator("XRP Breakout Trend Indicator", overlay=true, max_labels_count=500)// ===== Inputs =====groupTrend = "Trend"emaLen     = input.int(100, "EMA Length", minval=1, group=groupTrend)groupBreak = "Breakout"donLen     = input.int(20, "Donchian Length", minval=2, group=groupBreak)groupRisk  = "Risk"atrLen     = input.int(14, "ATR Length", minval=1, group=groupRisk)atrMult    = input.float(2.5, "ATR Stop Multiplier", minval=0.1, step=0.1, group=groupRisk)groupMom   = "Momentum"rsiLen     = input.int(14, "RSI Length", minval=1, group=groupMom)rsiBull    = input.int(52, "Bull RSI Filter", minval=1, maxval=99, group=groupMom)rsiBear    = input.int(48, "Bear RSI Filter", minval=1, maxval=99, group=groupMom)groupVis   = "Visual"showLabels = input.bool(true, "Show BUY/SELL Labels", group=groupVis)showTable  = input.bool(true, "Show Status Table", group=groupVis)// ===== Core =====emaBase = ta.ema(close, emaLen)upper   = ta.highest(high, donLen)lower   = ta.lowest(low, donLen)atrVal  = ta.atr(atrLen)rsiVal  = ta.rsi(close, rsiLen)// ===== Conditions =====trendUp   = close > emaBasetrendDown = close < emaBaselongBreak  = close > upper[1]shortBreak = close < lower[1]momBull = rsiVal > rsiBullmomBear = rsiVal < rsiBearlongSignal  = trendUp and longBreak and momBullshortSignal = trendDown and shortBreak and momBearstrongLong  = longSignal and close > emaBase and emaBase > emaBase[1]strongShort = shortSignal and close < emaBase and emaBase < emaBase[1]// ===== Stops =====longStop  = close - atrVal * atrMultshortStop = close + atrVal * atrMult// ===== Plots =====plot(emaBase, "EMA 100", color=color.orange, linewidth=2)plot(upper, "Donchian High", color=color.new(color.green, 20))plot(lower, "Donchian Low", color=color.new(color.red, 20))plot(longSignal ? longStop : na, "Long Stop", color=color.red, style=plot.style_linebr, linewidth=2)plot(shortSignal ? shortStop : na, "Short Stop", color=color.green, style=plot.style_linebr, linewidth=2)bgcolor(trendUp ? color.new(color.green, 93) : trendDown ? color.new(color.red, 93) : na)if showLabels and longSignal    label.new(bar_index, low, strongLong ? "BUY+" : "BUY", style=label.style_label_up, color=strongLong ? color.green : color.new(color.green, 20), textcolor=color.white)if showLabels and shortSignal    label.new(bar_index, high, strongShort ? "SELL+" : "SELL", style=label.style_label_down, color=strongShort ? color.red : color.new(color.red, 20), textcolor=color.white)// ===== Alerts =====alertcondition(longSignal, "XRP BUY", "XRP breakout BUY signal")alertcondition(shortSignal, "XRP SELL", "XRP breakout SELL signal")alertcondition(strongLong, "XRP STRONG BUY", "XRP strong breakout BUY signal")alertcondition(strongShort, "XRP STRONG SELL", "XRP strong breakout SELL signal")// ===== Table =====var table t = table.new(position.top_right, 2, 6, border_width=1)if barstate.islast and showTable    table.cell(t, 0, 0, "XRP", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.black)    table.cell(t, 1, 0, trendUp ? "UP" : "DOWN", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=trendUp ? color.green : color.red)    table.cell(t, 0, 1, "RSI", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.black)    table.cell(t, 1, 1, str.tostring(rsiVal, "#.0"), text_color=color.white, bgcolor=rsiVal >= 50 ? color.green : color.red)    table.cell(t, 0, 2, "Breakout", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.black)    table.cell(t, 1, 2, longBreak ? "UP" : shortBreak ? "DOWN" : "-", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=longBreak ? color.green : shortBreak ? color.red : color.gray)    table.cell(t, 0, 3, "Signal", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.black)    table.cell(t, 1, 3, longSignal ? "BUY" : shortSignal ? "SELL" : "-", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=longSignal ? color.green : shortSignal ? color.red : color.gray)    table.cell(t, 0, 4, "ATR", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.black)    table.cell(t, 1, 4, str.tostring(atrVal, "#.0000"), text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.blue)    table.cell(t, 0, 5, "Stop", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.black)    table.cell(t, 1, 5, longSignal ? str.tostring(longStop, "#.0000") : shortSignal ? str.tostring(shortStop, "#.0000") : "-", text_color=color.white, bgcolor=color.purple)
description: XRP Breakout Trend IndicatorBuilt specifically for XRP’s unique behavior: long consolidations followed by explosive moves.Trend filter with EMADonchian breakout detectionRSI momentum filterATR-based stop levelsWait for the breakout. Ride the move.XRP特有の「長いレンジ」と「急激なブレイク」に対応した専用インジケーター。トレンド・ブレイク・勢い・リスク管理を一つに統合。主な機能EMAでトレンド方向を明確化ドンチャンでブレイクポイントを検知RSIで勢いフィルターATRで損切りライン自動表示👉 「待って、抜けたら乗る」戦略をそのまま再現

name: JWl6PydK
title: indigobigboss — Indicator by luckypiss — TradingView
source:
//@version=6indicator("indigo揚帆起航", overlay=true, max_labels_count=500)// ===== Inputs =====emaFastLen = input.int(12, "EMA 12", minval=1)ema144Len  = input.int(144, "EMA 144", minval=1)ema169Len  = input.int(169, "EMA 169", minval=1)ema576Len  = input.int(576, "EMA 576", minval=1)ema676Len  = input.int(676, "EMA 676", minval=1)atrLen    = input.int(14, "ATR Length", minval=1)atrMult   = input.float(2.0, "SL ATR Multiplier", minval=0.1, step=0.1)useTrendFilter = input.bool(true, "Use 576/676 Trend Filter")showLabels     = input.bool(true, "Show Labels")showSignals    = input.bool(true, "Show Signals")showSLTP       = input.bool(true, "Show SL / TP")// ===== EMA =====ema12  = ta.ema(close, emaFastLen)ema144 = ta.ema(close, ema144Len)ema169 = ta.ema(close, ema169Len)ema576 = ta.ema(close, ema576Len)ema676 = ta.ema(close, ema676Len)atr    = ta.atr(atrLen)// ===== Vegas =====vegasTop = math.max(ema144, ema169)vegasBot = math.min(ema144, ema169)bigTop = math.max(ema576, ema676)bigBot = math.min(ema576, ema676)// ===== Trend =====bullTrend = ema576 > ema676bearTrend = ema576 < ema676// ===== Setup 條件 =====// 做多 setup：價格已跌破 vegas 下緣，但 EMA12 還在 vegas 上方longSetupBar = low < vegasBot and ema12 > vegasTop and (not useTrendFilter or bullTrend)// 做空 setup：價格已突破 vegas 上緣，但 EMA12 還在 vegas 下方shortSetupBar = high > vegasTop and ema12 < vegasBot and (not useTrendFilter or bearTrend)// ===== 狀態機 =====var bool waitLongTurn = falsevar bool waitShortTurn = false// 觸發 setup 後，進入等待拐頭狀態if longSetupBar    waitLongTurn := true    waitShortTurn := falseif shortSetupBar    waitShortTurn := true    waitLongTurn := false// ===== 拐頭確認 =====// 做多：等待 setup 後，出現轉強KlongTurn = waitLongTurn and close > open and close > close[1] and high > high[1]// 做空：等待 setup 後，出現轉弱KshortTurn = waitShortTurn and close < open and close < close[1] and low < low[1]// ===== 最終訊號 =====longSignal = longTurnshortSignal = shortTurn// 出現訊號後，重置等待if longSignal    waitLongTurn := falseif shortSignal    waitShortTurn := false// 若 EMA12 已經失守 Vegas，取消等待if ema12 <= vegasTop    waitLongTurn := falseif ema12 >= vegasBot    waitShortTurn := false// ===== Entry / SL / TP =====longEntry = closelongSL    = longEntry - atr * atrMultlongTP    = longEntry + (longEntry - longSL)   // 1:1shortEntry = closeshortSL    = shortEntry + atr * atrMultshortTP    = shortEntry - (shortSL - shortEntry) // 1:1// ===== Plot =====plot(ema12, title="EMA 12", color=color.white, linewidth=2)p144 = plot(ema144, title="EMA 144", color=color.blue, linewidth=2)p169 = plot(ema169, title="EMA 169", color=color.blue, linewidth=2)fill(p144, p169, color=color.new(color.blue, 85), title="Vegas 144/169")p576 = plot(ema576, title="EMA 576", color=color.red, linewidth=2)p676 = plot(ema676, title="EMA 676", color=color.red, linewidth=2)fill(p576, p676, color=color.new(color.red, 88), title="Vegas 576/676")// ===== Signals =====plotshape(showSignals and longSignal, title="LONG", location=location.belowbar, style=shape.labelup, color=color.blue, text="做多")plotshape(showSignals and shortSignal, title="SHORT", location=location.abovebar, style=shape.labeldown, color=color.red, text="做空")// ===== SL / TP =====plot(showSLTP and longSignal ? longSL : na, title="Long SL", color=color.red, linewidth=2, style=plot.style_linebr)plot(showSLTP and longSignal ? longTP : na, title="Long TP", color=color.green, linewidth=2, style=plot.style_linebr)plot(showSLTP and shortSignal ? shortSL : na, title="Short SL", color=color.red, linewidth=2, style=plot.style_linebr)plot(showSLTP and shortSignal ? shortTP : na, title="Short TP", color=color.green, linewidth=2, style=plot.style_linebr)// ===== Labels =====if showLabels and longSignal    label.new(         bar_index,         low,         "做多
Entry: " + str.tostring(longEntry, format.mintick) +         "
SL: " + str.tostring(longSL, format.mintick) +         "
TP: " + str.tostring(longTP, format.mintick),         style=label.style_label_up,         textcolor=color.white,         color=color.blue     )if showLabels and shortSignal    label.new(         bar_index,         high,         "做空
Entry: " + str.tostring(shortEntry, format.mintick) +         "
SL: " + str.tostring(shortSL, format.mintick) +         "
TP: " + str.tostring(shortTP, format.mintick),         style=label.style_label_down,         textcolor=color.white,         color=color.red     )// ===== Alerts =====alertcondition(longSignal, title="Vegas Pullback Long", message="價格跌破 Vegas，但 EMA12 未跌破，且價格開始往上拐 -> 做多")alertcondition(shortSignal, title="Vegas Pullback Short", message="價格突破 Vegas，但 EMA12 未突破，且價格開始往下拐 -> 做空")

name: Daily Mid Line
title: Daily Mid Line — Indicator by Fritzbr — TradingView
source: //@version=6indicator("Daily Mid Line", overlay=true)// ── Inputs ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────lineColor = input.color(color.new(color.orange, 0), "Line color")lineWidth = input.int(1, "Line width", minval=1, maxval=4)showLabel = input.bool(true, "Show label on last bar")// ── Use time("D") to track the exchange trading day ─────────────────// time("D") returns the timestamp of the daily bar the current bar// belongs to — this respects the exchange session, not the clock.currentDayTime = time("D")isNewDay = ta.change(currentDayTime) != 0// ── Accumulate today's high/low within the exchange session ──────────var float dayHigh = navar float dayLow  = navar int   dayID   = naif isNewDay or na(dayID)    dayHigh := high    dayLow  := low    dayID   := int(currentDayTime)else    dayHigh := math.max(dayHigh, high)    dayLow  := math.min(dayLow,  low)midpoint = (dayHigh + dayLow) / 2// ── Only draw on bars belonging to the current trading day ──────────onCurrentDay = int(currentDayTime) == dayID// ── Dotted midline via circles ───────────────────────────────────────plot(onCurrentDay ? midpoint : na,     color     = lineColor,     linewidth = lineWidth,     style     = plot.style_circles,     title     = "Day Mid")// ── Price label on the rightmost bar ────────────────────────────────if showLabel and barstate.islast and onCurrentDay    label.new(bar_index, midpoint,         text      = "Mid " + str.tostring(midpoint, format.mintick),         style     = label.style_label_left,         color     = lineColor,         textcolor = color.white,         size      = size.small)
description: Mid line tempoict ifvg fbr 50% range mid line tempotrades

name: EURUSD Londres PRO
title: EURUSD Londres PRO — Strategy by jonatansalinasp — TradingView
source: //@version=5strategy("EURUSD Londres PRO", overlay=true)// Configuraciónpip = 0.0001rr = input.float(2.0, "RR (2 o 3)")// Sesión Londres mejorada (04:30 - 09:30)london_session = input.session("0430-0930", "Sesion Londres")in_london = not na(time(timeframe.period, london_session))// Variablesvar float london_high = navar float london_low = navar bool trade_taken = false// Reset diarioif ta.change(time("D"))    london_high := na    london_low := na    trade_taken := false// Calcular rango Londresif in_london    london_high := na(london_high) ? high : math.max(london_high, high)    london_low := na(london_low) ? low : math.min(london_low, low)// POC (promedio)poc = (london_high + london_low) / 2// Entradasbuy_price = poc + (10 * pip)sell_price = poc - (10 * pip)// SLbuy_sl = london_lowsell_sl = london_high// TPbuy_tp = buy_price + (buy_price - buy_sl) * rrsell_tp = sell_price - (sell_sl - sell_price) * rr// Ejecutar (1 trade al día)if not na(poc) and not trade_taken    strategy.entry("BUY", strategy.long, stop=buy_price)    strategy.exit("TP/SL BUY", from_entry="BUY", stop=buy_sl, limit=buy_tp)    strategy.entry("SELL", strategy.short, stop=sell_price)    strategy.exit("TP/SL SELL", from_entry="SELL", stop=sell_sl, limit=sell_tp)    trade_taken := true// Dibujosplot(poc, color=color.yellow, linewidth=2)plot(london_high, color=color.green)plot(london_low, color=color.red)
description: prueba eurusd compra sesion de londres, entrada en compra de acuerdo a la direccion del mercado

name: FVG Fair value Gap MTF by DAN
title: FVG (Fair value Gap) MTF by DAN — Indicator by danielnaren — TradingView
source: //@version=6indicator("FVG MTF KEY LEVELS BY DAN", "FVG MTF BY DAN", overlay=true, max_lines_count=500, max_labels_count=500)// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════// INPUTS & SETTINGS// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════grp_vis = "Visual Settings"fvgColor      = input.color(color.new(#2196f3, 0), "FVG Line Color", group=grp_vis)lineWidth     = input.int(2, "Line Width", minval=1, maxval=5, group=grp_vis)lineStyleName = input.string("Solid", "Line Style", options=["Solid", "Dashed", "Dotted"], group=grp_vis)colorFvgCandle= input.bool(true, "Color FVG Candle (Candle 2)", group=grp_vis)colBullCandle = input.color(color.new(#00c853, 0), "Bull Candle Color", group=grp_vis)colBearCandle = input.color(color.new(#d50000, 0), "Bear Candle Color", group=grp_vis)grp_dash = "Dashboard Settings"showDashboard = input.bool(true, "Show Dashboard", group=grp_dash)dashPosition  = input.string("Top Right", "Position", options=["Top Right", "Bottom Right"], group=grp_dash)colBullOpen   = input.color(color.new(#00c853, 30), "Bull Open Color",  group=grp_dash)colBearOpen   = input.color(color.new(#d50000, 30), "Bear Open Color",  group=grp_dash)colBullTap    = input.color(color.new(#00c853, 0), "Bull Fill Color",   group=grp_dash)colBearTap    = input.color(color.new(#d50000, 0), "Bear Fill Color",   group=grp_dash)colNone       = input.color(color.new(#607d8b, 85), "None Color",       group=grp_dash)grp_alerts = "Alert Settings"alertCreation   = input.bool(true, "Alert on FVG Creation", group=grp_alerts)alertMitigation = input.bool(true, "Alert on FVG Mitigation (Tap)", group=grp_alerts)alertM30        = input.bool(true, "Enable M30 Alerts", group=grp_alerts)alertH1         = input.bool(true, "Enable H1 Alerts", group=grp_alerts)alertH4         = input.bool(true, "Enable H4 Alerts", group=grp_alerts)alertD          = input.bool(true, "Enable Daily Alerts", group=grp_alerts)alertW          = input.bool(true, "Enable Weekly Alerts", group=grp_alerts)grp_extra = "Extra Pairs to Monitor (Total 5 including Chart)"sym1 = input.symbol("", "Pair 1", group=grp_extra)sym2 = input.symbol("", "Pair 2", group=grp_extra)sym3 = input.symbol("", "Pair 3", group=grp_extra)sym4 = input.symbol("", "Pair 4", group=grp_extra)// Helpersf_getLineStyle(s) =>    s == "Dashed" ? line.style_dashed : s == "Dotted" ? line.style_dotted : line.style_solid// ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════// FVG CORE LOGIC// ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════// Evaluate BOTH Creation and Mitigation natively on the target timeframef_fvg_raw() =>    isBull = low[1] > high[3]    isBear = high[1] < low[3]    hasFvg = isBull or isBear        float top = ta.valuewhen(hasFvg, isBull ? low[1] : low[3], 0)    float bot = ta.valuewhen(hasFvg, isBull ? high[3] : high[1], 0)    bool isB  = ta.valuewhen(hasFvg, isBull, 0)    int sT    = int(ta.valuewhen(hasFvg, time[3], 0))    int cT    = int(ta.valuewhen(hasFvg, time[1], 0))        // Natively track lowest low / highest high since the FVG was formed    float minL = low    float maxH = high    minL := sT > 0 and sT == sT[1] ? math.min(low, nz(minL[1], low)) : low    maxH := sT > 0 and sT == sT[1] ? math.max(high, nz(maxH[1], high)) : high        // Evaluate pure MTF State (1=Bull, 2=Bear, 3=BullTap, 4=BearTap)    int state = 0    if sT > 0        if isB            state := minL < top ? 3 : 1        else            state := maxH > bot ? 4 : 2                [top, bot, isB, sT, cT, state]// Data Gathering (6 Symbols * 5 TFs = 30 calls = Extremely Optimized)f_get_m30(s) => request.security(s, "30", f_fvg_raw())f_get_h1(s)  => request.security(s, "60", f_fvg_raw())f_get_h4(s)  => request.security(s, "240", f_fvg_raw())f_get_d(s)   => request.security(s, "D", f_fvg_raw())f_get_w(s)   => request.security(s, "W", f_fvg_raw())// Unpacking Chart Data[t0_3, b0_3, isB0_3, sT0_3, cT0_3, st0_3] = f_get_m30(syminfo.tickerid)[t0_h, b0_h, isB0_h, sT0_h, cT0_h, st0_h] = f_get_h1(syminfo.tickerid)[t0_4, b0_4, isB0_4, sT0_4, cT0_4, st0_4] = f_get_h4(syminfo.tickerid)[t0_d, b0_d, isB0_d, sT0_d, cT0_d, st0_d] = f_get_d(syminfo.tickerid)[t0_w, b0_w, isB0_w, sT0_w, cT0_w, st0_w] = f_get_w(syminfo.tickerid)// Unpacking Symbol 1safeSym1 = sym1 == "" ? syminfo.tickerid : sym1[t1_3, b1_3, isB1_3, sT1_3, cT1_3, st1_3] = f_get_m30(safeSym1)[t1_h, b1_h, isB1_h, sT1_h, cT1_h, st1_h] = f_get_h1(safeSym1)[t1_4, b1_4, isB1_4, sT1_4, cT1_4, st1_4] = f_get_h4(safeSym1)[t1_d, b1_d, isB1_d, sT1_d, cT1_d, st1_d] = f_get_d(safeSym1)[t1_w, b1_w, isB1_w, sT1_w, cT1_w, st1_w] = f_get_w(safeSym1)// Unpacking Symbol 2safeSym2 = sym2 == "" ? syminfo.tickerid : sym2[t2_3, b2_3, isB2_3, sT2_3, cT2_3, st2_3] = f_get_m30(safeSym2)[t2_h, b2_h, isB2_h, sT2_h, cT2_h, st2_h] = f_get_h1(safeSym2)[t2_4, b2_4, isB2_4, sT2_4, cT2_4, st2_4] = f_get_h4(safeSym2)[t2_d, b2_d, isB2_d, sT2_d, cT2_d, st2_d] = f_get_d(safeSym2)[t2_w, b2_w, isB2_w, sT2_w, cT2_w, st2_w] = f_get_w(safeSym2)// Unpacking Symbol 3safeSym3 = sym3 == "" ? syminfo.tickerid : sym3[t3_3, b3_3, isB3_3, sT3_3, cT3_3, st3_3] = f_get_m30(safeSym3)[t3_h, b3_h, isB3_h, sT3_h, cT3_h, st3_h] = f_get_h1(safeSym3)[t3_4, b3_4, isB3_4, sT3_4, cT3_4, st3_4] = f_get_h4(safeSym3)[t3_d, b3_d, isB3_d, sT3_d, cT3_d, st3_d] = f_get_d(safeSym3)[t3_w, b3_w, isB3_w, sT3_w, cT3_w, st3_w] = f_get_w(safeSym3)// Unpacking Symbol 4safeSym4 = sym4 == "" ? syminfo.tickerid : sym4[t4_3, b4_3, isB4_3, sT4_3, cT4_3, st4_3] = f_get_m30(safeSym4)[t4_h, b4_h, isB4_h, sT4_h, cT4_h, st4_h] = f_get_h1(safeSym4)[t4_4, b4_4, isB4_4, sT4_4, cT4_4, st4_4] = f_get_h4(safeSym4)[t4_d, b4_d, isB4_d, sT4_d, cT4_d, st4_d] = f_get_d(safeSym4)[t4_w, b4_w, isB4_w, sT4_w, cT4_w, st4_w] = f_get_w(safeSym4)// Active Chart Core Pattern (Evaluated at native chart TF)[tc, bc, blc, stc, ctc, chartState] = f_fvg_raw()// ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════// DASHBOARD & STATE MACHINE// ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════type FvgState    line topL    line botL    float pTop    float pBot    int state    int lastId    bool seededf_dashPos() =>    dashPosition == "Bottom Right" ? position.bottom_right : position.top_rightvar table dash = table.new(f_dashPos(), 6, 6, bgcolor=showDashboard ? color.new(color.black, 70) : na, border_width=showDashboard ? 1 : 0, border_color=showDashboard ? color.gray : na)f_update_cell(colIdx, rowIdx, state, isValid) =>    if showDashboard        txt = not isValid ? "" : state == 1 or state == 2 ? "OPEN" : state == 3 or state == 4 ? "FILL" : "NONE"        bg  = not isValid ? na : state == 1 ? colBullOpen : state == 2 ? colBearOpen : state == 3 ? colBullTap : state == 4 ? colBearTap : colNone        table.cell(dash, colIdx, rowIdx, txt, bgcolor=bg, text_color=color.white, text_size=size.small)// Professional Varip Memory arrays to track instantaneous state and prevent blockagesvarip array<int> alertStates = array.new<int>(31, 0)varip array<bool> isSeeded = array.new<bool>(31, false)f_process(stateObj, symName, tfName, colIdx, rowIdx, enabled, showVisual, top, bot, isBull, sT, cT, mtfState, col, idx) =>    bool isNew = sT != stateObj.lastId and not na(sT)    if isNew        stateObj.lastId := sT        stateObj.pTop   := top        stateObj.pBot   := bot                if showVisual            l1_val = isBull ? bot : top             l2_val = isBull ? top : bot             if na(stateObj.botL)                stateObj.botL := line.new(sT, l1_val, time, l1_val, xloc.bar_time, extend.none, col, f_getLineStyle(lineStyleName), lineWidth)                stateObj.topL := line.new(cT, l2_val, time, l2_val, xloc.bar_time, extend.none, col, f_getLineStyle(lineStyleName), lineWidth)            else                line.set_xy1(stateObj.botL, sT, l1_val)                line.set_xy2(stateObj.botL, time, l1_val)                line.set_xy1(stateObj.topL, cT, l2_val)                line.set_xy2(stateObj.topL, time, l2_val)                line.set_color(stateObj.botL, col)                line.set_color(stateObj.topL, col)                line.set_width(stateObj.botL, lineWidth)                line.set_width(stateObj.topL, lineWidth)                line.set_style(stateObj.botL, f_getLineStyle(lineStyleName))                line.set_style(stateObj.topL, f_getLineStyle(lineStyleName))        else            line.set_xy1(stateObj.botL, na, na)            line.set_xy1(stateObj.topL, na, na)    if (mtfState == 1 or mtfState == 2) and showVisual        line.set_x2(stateObj.botL, time)        line.set_x2(stateObj.topL, time)    // Varip Synchronization Block    bool seeded = array.get(isSeeded, idx)    if barstate.isrealtime and not seeded        array.set(alertStates, idx, mtfState)        array.set(isSeeded, idx, true)        seeded := true    int oldAlertState = array.get(alertStates, idx)    bool isValidPair = symName != ""    if enabled and seeded and barstate.isrealtime and isValidPair and mtfState != oldAlertState        array.set(alertStates, idx, mtfState) // Instantly update varip memory so next ticks on same bar don't execute        string pStr = (symName == syminfo.tickerid ? syminfo.ticker : symName)        if (mtfState == 1 or mtfState == 2) and alertCreation            string msg = (mtfState == 1 ? "BULLISH" : "BEARISH") + " FVG CREATED ON " + pStr + ", " + tfName            alert(msg, alert.freq_all)        else if (mtfState == 3 or mtfState == 4) and alertMitigation            string msg = (mtfState == 3 ? "BULLISH" : "BEARISH") + " FVG MITIGATED ON " + pStr + ", " + tfName            alert(msg, alert.freq_all)    if rowIdx > 0 and barstate.islast        f_update_cell(colIdx, rowIdx, mtfState, isValidPair)// Isolated States for Screen Trackingvar s0_3=FvgState.new(na,na,na,na,0,0)var s0_1=FvgState.new(na,na,na,na,0,0)var s0_4=FvgState.new(na,na,na,na,0,0)var s0_d=FvgState.new(na,na,na,na,0,0)var s0_w=FvgState.new(na,na,na,na,0,0)var s1_3=FvgState.new(na,na,na,na,0,0)var s1_1=FvgState.new(na,na,na,na,0,0)va
description: The Advanced Multi Timeframe FVG Dashboard is a tool built for traders who trade the FVG (Fair value gap) concept by ICT. this tool helps monitor FVG creation and mitigation across 5 pairs across 5 major timeframes (m30,h1,h4,daily,weekly) simultaneously.Core Features:The Ultimate MTF Dashboard: Instantly track Fair Value Gap states across M30, H1, H4, Daily, and Weekly timeframes. it highlights when a new FVG forms (OPEN) and exactly when price mitigates it (FILL). GREEN FOR BULLISH FVG, RED FOR BEARISH FVG. Multi-Pair Screening: Monitor your active chart plus up to 4 additional extra pairs of your choice (Forex, Crypto, Indices, etc.). Leave a slot empty and the dashboard seamlessly hides it to keep your screen clean.Distraction-Free Visuals: The indicator natively calculates and draws the precise Top and Bottom boundaries of the FVG, alongside an optional feature to custom-paint the displacement candle itself (Candle 2). it draws a horizontal line between candle 1 and 3 of the most recent FVG confirmation only, but it colors previous fvg formation candles.ALERTS: you can set an alert for both FVG creation and mitigation, simple toggle timeframe, pair and alerts type in settings, and you are good to goWho is this for?If you are an ICT or Smart Money Concepts (SMC) trader who misses high-timeframe PA shifts, this tool is designed for you.

name: JkvW2GxQ
title: Gold 4H BB + Volume MA Signals — Indicator by getrich03 — TradingView
source: //@version=6indicator("Gold 4H BB + Volume MA Signals", overlay = true, max_labels_count = 500)//=========================// Inputs//=========================bbLen   = input.int(24, "BB Length")bbMult  = input.float(2.2, "BB Mult")volLen  = input.int(30, "Volume MA Length")volBoost = input.float(1.2, "Volume Boost")useVolFilter = input.bool(true, "Use Volume Filter")//=========================// BB//=========================basis = ta.sma(close, bbLen)dev   = ta.stdev(close, bbLen) * bbMultupper = basis + devlower = basis - dev//=========================// Volume//=========================volMA = ta.sma(volume, volLen)highVol = volume > volMA * volBoost//=========================// Bias//=========================bullBias = close > basis and basis > basis[1]bearBias = close < basis and basis < basis[1]//=========================// BB状態//=========================bbWidth = upper - lowerbbExpand = bbWidth > bbWidth[1]//=========================// Volume条件//=========================volOk = not useVolFilter or highVol//=========================// Breakout（修正済）//=========================buyBreakout = (    ta.crossover(close, upper) and    bullBias and    bbExpand and    volOk)sellBreakout = (    ta.crossunder(close, lower) and    bearBias and    bbExpand and    volOk)//=========================// Reentry（修正済）//=========================buyReentry = (    low <= lower and    ta.crossover(close, basis) and    bullBias and    volOk)sellReentry = (    high >= upper and    ta.crossunder(close, basis) and    bearBias and    volOk)//=========================// Exit//=========================exitLong = ta.crossunder(close, basis)exitShort = ta.crossover(close, basis)//=========================// Plot//=========================p1 = plot(basis, "Basis", color=color.orange, linewidth=2)p2 = plot(upper, "Upper", color=color.blue)p3 = plot(lower, "Lower", color=color.blue)fill(p2, p3, color.new(color.blue, 90))//=========================// Signals//=========================plotshape(buyBreakout, location=location.belowbar, color=color.lime, style=shape.triangleup, text="BUY")plotshape(sellBreakout, location=location.abovebar, color=color.red, style=shape.triangledown, text="SELL")plotshape(buyReentry, location=location.belowbar, color=color.aqua, style=shape.circle, text="R")plotshape(sellReentry, location=location.abovebar, color=color.orange, style=shape.circle, text="R")plotshape(exitLong, location=location.abovebar, color=color.yellow, style=shape.xcross, text="EXIT")plotshape(exitShort, location=location.belowbar, color=color.yellow, style=shape.xcross, text="EXIT")//=========================// Alerts//=========================alertcondition(buyBreakout, "BUY", "BUY signal")alertcondition(sellBreakout, "SELL", "SELL signal")alertcondition(buyReentry, "BUY R", "Reentry BUY")alertcondition(sellReentry, "SELL R", "Reentry SELL")alertcondition(exitLong, "EXIT LONG", "Exit Long")alertcondition(exitShort, "EXIT SHORT", "Exit Short")
description: ■ DescriptionGold 4H OptimizedBB × Volume MA Integrated IndicatorA practical and streamlined trading tool that combines the core principles of Bollinger Bands and volume.By visualizing both price position and movement strength at the same time,it helps reduce unnecessary entries and supports more precise trading decisions.■ Features● Understand market conditions with Bollinger BandsQuickly identify trend formation, expansion, and contraction● Eliminate false signals with a single Volume MAFilter and focus only on moves backed by strong volume● Optimized for Gold 4-hour timeframeReduces noise and delivers stable, reliable signals● Clear and simple trading signalsDisplays BUY / SELL / R / EXIT visually■ Trading Logic🟢 BUYUpper band breakout + increasing volume👉 Capture the early stage of an uptrend🔴 SELLLower band breakout + increasing volume👉 Target the start of a downtrend🔵 R (Return / Re-entry)Re-acceleration after reclaiming the middle band👉 Enter on pullbacks or rebounds🟡 EXITBreak of the middle band👉 Signal of trend exhaustion■ StrengthsCombines trend and volume in one systemReduces false signals and improves entry accuracySimple and easy-to-use designSpecifically tuned for Gold (XAUUSD) 4H trading■ Best ForTraders focusing on Gold (XAUUSD)Breakout strategy tradersThose who want clean pullback entriesTraders looking to reduce overtrading■ In One Sentence👉 “A gold-focused indicator that captures only high-probability moves using price and volume”

name: CTZ Auto Fibonacci Retracement
title: CTZ Auto Fibonacci Retracement — Indicator by CryptoTradingZone — TradingView
source: //@version=6//// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────//  Auto Fibonacci Retracement// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────////  Automatically detects the most recent swing high and swing low//  and draws Fibonacci retracement levels between them.//  Updates in real time as new swings form.//// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────indicator("CTZ Auto Fibonacci Retracement", "Auto Fib", overlay = true, max_lines_count = 20, max_labels_count = 20)// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────//  INPUTS// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────i_swingLen      = input.int   (10,    "Swing Detection Length",   minval = 2,  maxval = 50,  group = "Swing Detection")i_source        = input.string("Wicks","Price Source",            options = ["Wicks", "Close"],                         group = "Swing Detection")i_show_0        = input.bool  (true,  "0%",                                                  group = "Levels")i_show_236      = input.bool  (true,  "23.6%",                                               group = "Levels")i_show_382      = input.bool  (true,  "38.2%",                                               group = "Levels")i_show_500      = input.bool  (true,  "50%",                                                 group = "Levels")i_show_618      = input.bool  (true,  "61.8%",                                               group = "Levels")i_show_705      = input.bool  (false, "70.5%",                                               group = "Levels")i_show_786      = input.bool  (true,  "78.6%",                                               group = "Levels")i_show_100      = input.bool  (true,  "100%",                                                group = "Levels")i_show_1272     = input.bool  (false, "127.2% (extension)",                                  group = "Levels")i_show_1618     = input.bool  (false, "161.8% (extension)",                                  group = "Levels")i_lineWidth     = input.int   (1,     "Line Width",               minval = 1,  maxval = 4,   group = "Style")i_lineStyle     = input.string("Dashed", "Line Style",            options = ["Solid","Dashed","Dotted"],                group = "Style")i_labelSize     = input.string("Small",  "Label Size",            options = ["Tiny","Small","Normal"],                 group = "Style")i_showPrice     = input.bool  (true,  "Show price on label",                                 group = "Style")i_extendLines   = input.bool  (true,  "Extend lines right",                                  group = "Style")i_c_0           = input.color (#787B86, "0% / 100%",                                         group = "Colors")i_c_236         = input.color (#F7525F, "23.6%",                                             group = "Colors")i_c_382         = input.color (#FF9800, "38.2%",                                             group = "Colors")i_c_500         = input.color (#4CAF50, "50%",                                               group = "Colors")i_c_618         = input.color (#2196F3, "61.8%",                                             group = "Colors")i_c_705         = input.color (#9C27B0, "70.5%",                                             group = "Colors")i_c_786         = input.color (#E040FB, "78.6%",                                             group = "Colors")i_c_ext         = input.color (#787B86, "Extensions",                                        group = "Colors")// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────//  SWING DETECTION// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────float hi = i_source == "Wicks" ? high : closefloat lo = i_source == "Wicks" ? low  : close// Pivot detection — confirmed i_swingLen bars backfloat swingHigh = ta.pivothigh(hi, i_swingLen, i_swingLen)float swingLow  = ta.pivotlow (lo, i_swingLen, i_swingLen)// Track the most recent confirmed swing high and low (price + bar index)var float lastSwingHighPrice = navar int   lastSwingHighBar   = navar float lastSwingLowPrice  = navar int   lastSwingLowBar    = naif not na(swingHigh)    lastSwingHighPrice := swingHigh    lastSwingHighBar   := bar_index - i_swingLenif not na(swingLow)    lastSwingLowPrice := swingLow    lastSwingLowBar   := bar_index - i_swingLen// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────//  FIBONACCI LEVELS// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────// Fib ratios and display configvar float[] ratios  = array.from(0.0, 0.236, 0.382, 0.5, 0.618, 0.705, 0.786, 1.0, 1.272, 1.618)var string[] labels = array.from("0", "0.236", "0.382", "0.5", "0.618", "0.705", "0.786", "1", "1.272", "1.618")// Which levels to show — matches ratio array orderf_showLevel(int idx) =>    switch idx        0 => i_show_0        1 => i_show_236        2 => i_show_382        3 => i_show_500        4 => i_show_618        5 => i_show_705        6 => i_show_786        7 => i_show_100        8 => i_show_1272        9 => i_show_1618        => false// Level colors — matches ratio array orderf_levelColor(int idx) =>    switch idx        0 => i_c_0        1 => i_c_236        2 => i_c_382        3 => i_c_500        4 => i_c_618        5 => i_c_705        6 => i_c_786        7 => i_c_0        8 => i_c_ext        9 => i_c_ext        => i_c_0// Line style helperf_lineStyle() =>    i_lineStyle == "Dashed" ? line.style_dashed :     i_lineStyle == "Dotted" ? line.style_dotted :     line.style_solid// Label size helperf_labelSize() =>    i_labelSize == "Tiny"   ? size.tiny   :     i_labelSize == "Normal" ? size.normal :     size.small// Storage arrays for lines and labels so we can delete and redrawvar line[]  fibLines  = array.new_line()var label[] fibLabels = array.new_label()f_deleteAll() =>    for ln in fibLines        line.delete(ln)    for lb in fibLabels        label.delete(lb)    array.clear(fibLines)    array.clear(fibLabels)// Only draw when both swings are knownbool canDraw = not na(lastSwingHighPrice) and not na(lastSwingLowPrice)// Determine trend direction based on which swing came last// If the high came after the low  → downtrend  → retrace from high to low// If the low  came after the high → uptrend    → retrace from low to highbool isBullish = canDraw and lastSwingLowBar > lastSwingHighBarfloat fibTop    = isBullish ? lastSwingHighPrice : lastSwingLowPricefloat fibBottom = isBullish ? lastSwingLowPrice  : lastSwingHighPricefloat fibRange  = fibTop - fibBottomint startBar    = isBullish ? lastSwingLowBar  : lastSwingHighBarint endBar      = bar_index + 20// Redraw on every bar (lines update as price moves)if canDraw and barstate.islast    f_deleteAll()    for i = 0 to array.size(ratios) - 1        if f_showLevel(i)            float ratio = array.get(ratios, i)            // Bullish: 0% = swing low, 100% = swing high (retracing downward from top)            // Level price = top - ratio * range  (so 0% is at top, 100% at bottom)            float lvlPrice = fibTop - ratio * fibRange            color lvlColor = f_levelColor(i)            // Draw line            ln = line.new(                 x1     = startBar,                 y1     = lvlPrice,                 x2     = endBar,                 y2     = lvlPrice,                 color  = lvlColor,                 width  = i_lineWidth,                 style  = f_lineStyle(),                 extend = i_extendLines ? extend.right : extend.none)            array.push(fibLines, ln)            // Draw label            string priceStr = i_showPrice ? "  " + str.tostring(math.round(lvlPrice, 2)) : ""            string labelStr = array.get(labels, i) + priceStr            lb = label.new(                 x      = endBar,                 y      = lvlPrice,                 text   = labelStr,                 color  = color.new(color.black, 100),                 textcolor = lvlColor,                 style  = label.style_label_left,                 size   = f_labelSize())            array.push(fibLabels, lb)// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────//  SWING MARKERS  (small triangles on confirmed pivots)// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────plotshape(not na(swingHigh), "Swing High", shape.triangledown, location.abovebar, color.new(#F7525F, 30), size = size.tiny)plotshape(not na(swingLow),  "Swing Low",  shape.triangleup,   location.belowbar, color.new(#4CAF50, 30), size = size.tiny)// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────//  ALERTS// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────alertcondition(not na(swingHigh), "New Swing High", "Auto Fib: New swing high detected — levels updated")alertcondition(not na(swingLow),  "New Swing Low",  "Auto Fib: New swing low detected — levels updated")// end
description: Auto Fibonacci RetracementAutomatically detects the most recent confirmed swing high and swing low on your chart and draws Fibonacci retracement levels between them in real time. No manual drawing needed. Every time a new swing forms the levels update automatically.The script identifies trend direction based on which swing came last. If the most recent swing was a low the market is in an uptrend and levels are drawn from the low up to the high. If the most recent swing was a high the market is in a downtrend and levels are drawn from the high down to the low. This means the 0 level always sits at the origin of the move and 100 always sits at the start.Default levels are 0, 23.6, 38.2, 50, 61.8, 78.6 and 100. Optional levels include 70.5, 127.2 and 161.8 for extension targets. Every level can be toggled on or off individually and given its own color.Small triangle markers appear directly on the chart at each confirmed pivot point so you can always see exactly which swing high and swing low the indicator is working from.Settings include swing detection length, wick or close based pivots, line style, line width, label size, price display on labels and the option to extend lines to the right.Alerts fire when a new swing high or swing low is detected so you are notified the moment the levels update.
